blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA blocks automated Clerk authentication in agent-browser. Dev server 500 fixed (middleware moved to src/middleware.ts), but CAPTCHA prevents sign-up/sign-in. Page loads (200), URL preserved. Server-side rendering verified via vitest (prefillUrl passed to ExtensionJobChecker).

Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA blocks automated Clerk authentication in agent-browser. Cannot verify client-side match status display, parsed fields, or application history without authenticated session. Server-side rendering verified via vitest (component receives correct props).

Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA blocks automated Clerk authentication in agent-browser. Cannot verify mark-applied button presence without authenticated session. Server-side rendering verified via vitest (component rendered).

appliedUpdates.description: Updated Known Issue: middleware fix resolved (round 1 blocker). Documented new blocker: Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA blocks automated Clerk auth in headless browsers.
